title: Want Better Conversions?
subtitle: Try showing up when they're actually looking. It's rarely about the calendar.

title: Make Them Jealous — They'll Thank You for It
subtitle: How to use contrast, not features, to drive customer satisfaction.

title: Stop Chasing Minnows — Go for the Whales
subtitle: How we discovered high-value customers in an unexpected product.

title: Make It Easy to Leave
subtitle: That's how you make the next one stay. Let them go — just make sure they remember.

title: Customers don't lie.
subtitle: They just misremember — in predictable ways. That's what the funnel really tells you.

title: Ogilvy was wrong.
subtitle: He claimed kids, sex, and animals grab the most attention. A good question beats all three.
